title: LocationClipboard
description: A mod used to copy location customizable
body:
**LocationClipboard** is a utility mod that copies your current or recent coordinates to the clipboard with ease.

## Features ✨

- **📍 Record Current Position**: Copy your current location instantly with a customizable hotkey.
- **📝 Multi-Position Logging**: Start logging multiple positions with one hotkey, record each spot using another hotkey, and stop to merge all logged coordinates (with a custom separator) into one copy action.
- **⏱️ Auto-Logging**: After starting multi-position logging, the mod can automatically record your position at regular intervals. All recorded coordinates are merged when you stop logging.

## Highlights 🌟

- **🎛️ Highly Customizable**: Adjust the copy format, decimal precision, and notification messages to your liking.
- **🖱️ Simple & User-Friendly**: Operate entirely via hotkeys and a polished configuration screen powered by **Cloth Config API**. No commands needed.
- **🔄 Broad Version Support**: Compatible with **Fabric 1.16+**

## Usage 🛠️

Before using this mod, ensure you have:

- **Minecraft (Java Edition) 1.16 or above**
- **Fabric Loader 0.14.7 or above**

Required dependencies:

- **Fabric API** (any version)
- **Cloth Config API 4.9+**
- **ModMenu** (any version)

Then, install **LocationClipboard**, configure it via the ModMenu settings button, set up your preferred hotkeys in the options screen, and you're ready to use it in your world!
